title: ulex scaber var. willkommii
intro: Ulex scaber var. willkommii, commonly known as the gorse broom, is a plant species within the genus Ulex. It is a shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula and the western parts of the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving digestion due to its therapeutic actions of anti-inflammatory and digestive system regulation. The bioactive constituents of Ulex scaber var. willkommii include flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
